name: Potato Casserole W/saffron, Almonds, Bread Cr
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Spanish or other fragrant virgin olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Peel potatoes (leave skins on if organically grown). Cut into large chunks and place in a baking dish large enough for potatoes to form a single layer.
3. Season with salt and pepper and sprinkle with saffron.
4. In a skillet, heat oil. Tear bread into pieces and fry with almonds and garlic until golden, about 5 minutes. Remove garlic if it gets too dark.
5. Grind bread-almond mixture with a mortar and pestle or in a food processor with a little boiling water until fairly smooth. Stir in paprika and season with salt and pepper.
6. Add bread-almond mixture to the potatoes, along with remaining water. Cover dish with foil and bake for 45 minutes.
7. Remove foil, stir contents and continue baking until liquid has been absorbed and potatoes are tender. Broil to brown the top.
8. Garnish with parsley. Serves 4.
Per serving: 365 calories; 7g protein; 12g fat; 55g carbohydrate; 0 cholesterol; 590mg sodium; 7g fiber. Vegan/Vegetarian Times, Nov 93/MM by Deanne
